nodes.name: Get eBay Sources
nodes.notes: Agregar un vendedor de eBay = insertar una fila en sources. No se toca este workflow.

nodes.name: Loop Over Sellers
nodes.notes: Salida 0 = terminó el loop. Salida 1 = siguiente vendedor.

nodes.name: eBay Browse API
nodes.notes:
onError=continue: si un vendedor falla, el loop sigue con los demás.
MVP: solo la primera página (hasta 200 items). TODO v2: seguir el link 'next' de la respuesta para paginar.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO products (
  source_id, source_platform, external_id, name, description, category,
  price, currency, availability, image_url, product_url, seller_name, location, scraped_at
)
VALUES ($1, 'ebay', $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, true, $8, $9, $10, $11, now())
ON CONFLICT (source_id, external_id) DO UPDATE SET
  name         = EXCLUDED.name,
  description  = EXCLUDED.description,
  category     = EXCLUDED.category,
  price        = EXCLUDED.price,
  currency     = EXCLUDED.currency,
  availability = true,
  image_url    = EXCLUDED.image_url,
  product_url  = EXCLUDED.product_url,
  seller_name  = EXCLUDED.seller_name,
  location     = EXCLUDED.location,
  scraped_at   = now(),
  updated_at   = now();

INSERT INTO scrape_runs (source_id, source_type, status, items_found, items_upserted, error_message, finished_at)
VALUES ($1, 'ebay', $2, $3, $4, $5, now());

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Loop Over Sellers').first().json.id, ($('eBay Browse API').first().json.error ? 'error' : 'success'), ($('eBay Browse API').first().json.total ?? 0), $('Map a Products').all().length, ($('eBay Browse API').first().json.error ? JSON.stringify($('eBay Browse API').first().json.error).slice(0, 500) : null) ] }}

nodes.name: Log Scrape Run
nodes.notes: executeOnce: una fila de auditoría por vendedor, no una por producto.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO scrape_runs (source_id, source_type, status, items_found, items_upserted, error_message, finished_at)
VALUES ($1, 'ebay', 'error', 0, 0, $2, now());

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Loop Over Sellers').first().json.id, 'Sin resultados o error de la Browse API: ' + JSON.stringify($json).slice(0, 400) ] }}
